programme.title: My Roots: Bernhard Langer
programme.desc: Bernhard Langer shares his own story in open and honest language, giving golf fans an unprecedented look at his life, losses, and love of the game.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Eight-time PGA Tour winner and 2003 Masters Champion Mike Weir shows how he executes a variety of shots on and around the green. He demonstrates how to hit a bump and run, a high and soft chip, and how to play out of bad lies.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Eight-time PGA Tour winner and 2003 Masters champion Mike Weir shows how he executes a variety of shots on and around the green.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: PGA Tour winner and Masters Champion Mike Weir goes in depth on how he built and adapted his full swing throughout his career. He talks about everything from basic fundamentals all the way through how to hit some of the most unique shots in golf.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Trevor Immelman, 2008 Masters champion, offers tips on putting instruction he learned from golf legends, Gary Player, Ernie Els,and Retief Goosen.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal are sharing wisdom from Masters champions to lower scores.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall shares the wisdom he's learned from some of the greatest Masters Champions. Learn three big swing keys from Jack Nicklaus, how to hit it like Arnold Palmer with the help of two tees, and numerous drills Tiger Woods did at an early age.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches the key shots that helped players become a Masters Champion; learn to control distance with irons like Tiger Woods, shape shots like Hideki Matsuyama and putt on fast greens like Jack Nicklaus.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Masters champion Danny Willett goes in-depth on accounting for wind, adjusting play from a divot or behind a tree, and going for a par-5 from the fairway as opposed to a fairway bunker.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Jon Rahm shows how he uses his supreme power and touch around the greens to go low on the course. Rahm goes in depth to show how to strategically break down long putts into segments for an accurate read.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Brandel Chamblee on the course to share his thoughts, strategies, and overall course management in part one of this two-part episode.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Brandel Chamblee on the course to share his thoughts, strategies, and overall course management in part two of this two-part episode. Rory shares his pre-round putting routine and goes in-depth on his green reading process.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The ladies arrive on the island of Great Exuma, Bahamas, where they are met with a surprise twist that immediately changes the face of the competition.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: What a Tangled Web We Weave
programme.desc: Lines are drawn and allegiances are tested as the ladies face the ever present threat of elimination.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: You're Gonna Need a Bigger Boat
programme.desc: Greg Norman arrives on the island, and for the ladies, not winning immunity could have shattering consequences.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: One of the ladies continues to ride her streak of good luck, much to the displeasure of her competition.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Money is on the line, underlying tensions surface, and an eagle headlines a shocking elimination.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: Rematch - Kip Henley vs. Don Donatello
programme.desc: Contestants battle for the opportunity to compete in a professional golf event.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Masters champion Scottie Scheffler gives Chris an inside look alongside longtime coach Randy Smith.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Masters champion Sandy Lyle breaks down all things full swing and shows how his compact, but powerful swing has been so consistent through the years. Lyle shares how to maximize distance with every club.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: World Golf Hall of Fame inductee Sandy Lyle shows how to handle difficult lies with minor technique adjustments and gives great advice on attacking tough pins. Lyle also talks about his new putting method that has helped as he gotten older.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.sub-title: Sandy Lyle - Shots You Need to Practice
programme.desc: Sandy Lyle reveals how to hit a successful shot out of a divot and from under a tree. The 1985 Open Champion also teaches how to control trajectory in windy conditions.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Multiple-time PGA Tour Champions winner Jerry Kelly breaks down all things full swing and shows how his feel-driven, but powerful, swing has been so effective through the years. Kelly shares his secret to controlling and maximizing distance.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como

programme.desc: Chris Como is in Celebration, Florida where he joins John Montgomery, golf social media extraordinaire.
